rulings.Case Title: YINGCHEN SONG VS. RENTAL CAR FINANCE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 25, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFFS INTEL CORPORATION, YINGCHEN SONG, ZHENHUA CHEN, HAILEI WANG, JUNHU LIU, AND LEJIA DING'S Motion To Set Trial Date. Grant trial set April, 8, 2013 at 9:30 AM in Department 206. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JULIUS BRIGGS VS. MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 25, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFFS JULIUS BRIGGS, GEORGE CARABALLO, WILLIAM GRANT, BRODERICK HARRISON, AND REGINA JONES' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Judgment on the pleadings is denied. Court finds nature of complaint frames defendant's answer. (See North v. Evans 117 CA 317) Complaint is conclusory and moving party fails to show how discovery responses failed to reveal facts to support defenses. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TAI-ANH NGUYEN VS. MORTGAGEIT INC, A BUSINESS ENTITY FROM UNKNOWN, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Perliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 25, 2013, line 3. Order To Show Cause Re: Perliminary Injunction. Continued to February 15, 2013 per stipulation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REAL EQUITY PARTNERS, LLC VS. BENNY MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Determination Of Prevailing Parties For Purposes Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 25, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANTS CAITLIN FITTING and BENJAMIN MARTIN'S Motion For Determination of Prevailing Parties For Purposes of Attorney's Fees and Costs. Deny fails to sustain burden. Court finds: (1) amended complaint was filed timely; (2) motion to dismiss not motion to quash proper remedy; (3) plaintiff advised defendant complaint would be dismissed prior to motion to quash being filed (see Uchiyama declaration paragraph three).= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YELENA NESTERUK VS. IRINA KORNENKO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 25, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT IRINA KORNIYENKO AND VLADIMIR MATUSEVICH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend. Court finds 90 days notice applicable per CC 1954.535. See Wasatch and legislative history 1954.535. Owner move-in not tenant's fault. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LUZVIMINDA BLANCO VS. DONALD S MACPHERSON
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 25, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT DONALD MACPHERSON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend 17F, three-day notice expired December 14, 2012. = (501/REQ)
